title: BoatElevatorFix
description: Fixes the issue, where players get ejected from boats in a soulsand elevator
body:
# Boat Elevator Fix

This is a tiny plugin, which prevents the player from getting ejected, while using a bubble
column/water elevator with a boat.

There is no configuration, and it works in both directions.
- upwards (soul sand) 
- downwards (magma blocks).

Fixes [MC-154589](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-154589)

# Supported Versions

- Java: `<= Java 11`
- Bukkit: `<= 1.13`
